# pc-emulation-book custom dictionary

# framework stuff
mdbook
mathrm
peaceiris

# technical terms
Kbit
bitfield
bitfields
bitstream
bitcell
regs
scancode
scancodes
microcontroller
typematic
datasheet
datasheets
ascii
scanlines

freqs
HSYNC
VSYNC

CRTC
CRTC's
grayscale
dipswitch
RGBI
chipset
chipsets
VLSI
PLCC
CMII
ERAM
overscan
NTSC
subcarrier
hdots
hsync
hclock
lclock
rasterizes
rasterizing
DREQ
Datasheet
underclock
Hmos
rgba
kbps
kbits
Mbits
keydown
Vsync
INTA
DACK
LSBMSB
hdot
vsync
vhold
hblank
vblank
VTAC
MOSFET
photodiode
scanout
lowres
LPSTB
luma
MMFM
DDAM
IDAM
nums
